overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a green dress walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character walks through covered corridors, stops to smoke at a street corner, then continues down stairs and along city streets with towering digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered neon-lit pedestrian walkway transitioning to open plaza

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor with cyan neon lighting, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in same direction through corridor

entered.detail: covered pedestrian walkway with reflective floor and cyan neon light strips along edges
glowing cyan neon light strips embedded in the floor along the walkway edges
tall building with illuminated digital advertisements and red signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian corridor with glowing cyan neon strips embedded in the reflective floor. Other pedestrians are visible ahead. The corridor opens into a wider plaza area with tall glass buildings and digital billboards visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner under building overhang with view of traffic and digital billboards

events.description: character stops and leans against building wall
character lights a cigarette and begins smoking
futuristic vehicle drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: leaning against building wall smoking a cigarette while observing street traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving past on the street
pedestrian in blue jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete building wall where character leans to smoke
large red illuminated digital billboard displaying advertisements across the street
wet asphalt street with moving traffic visible from the corner

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a building corner and leans against a concrete wall to smoke a cigarette. From this sheltered position, she observes sparse traffic of futuristic vehicles passing on the wet street below, while pedestrians occasionally walk through the plaza. A large red digital billboard illuminates the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza leading to stair descent to lower street level

events.description: character pushes off wall and resumes walking
descends wide concrete stairs to lower street level

agents.ego_description: walking away from the wall, crossing the plaza and descending a flight of illuminated stairs to a lower street level

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with blue illuminated edge markers leading downward
lower city street visible at bottom of stairs with yellow directional arrows on barriers

segments.scene_description: The character finishes smoking and walks away from the building corner across the open plaza. She approaches and descends a wide flight of concrete stairs with illuminated edges, heading down to a lower level of the city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with towering digital billboards and modern architecture

events.description: reaches bottom of stairs and enters street level walkway
passes by other pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk past storefronts and large digital displays, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete sidewalk with reflective wet surface alongside the road
tall building facade covered in large colorful digital advertisements and neon signage
yellow and black striped concrete barriers along the edge of the road

segments.scene_description: At the bottom of the stairs, the character walks along a city sidewalk lined with modern buildings featuring massive digital billboards and neon signage. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights as she passes other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon corridor into the expansive, rain-slicked streets of a futuristic city. It begins by trailing the character through a covered pedestrian walkway with glowing cyan strips on the floor, moving forward as the space opens into a wide plaza flanked by towering glass buildings. The camera then lingers as she pauses at a concrete corner to smoke, shifting the focus toward the sparse traffic of futuristic vehicles and a massive red billboard illuminating the wet surroundings. As she moves away from the wall, the scene transitions toward a wide flight of illuminated concrete stairs that lead the character down to a lower urban level. Finally, the shot follows her along a city sidewalk where the wet pavement reflects a dense array of massive digital billboards and vibrant neon signage.
